name: Blank
description: A bare canvas: shadcn + Tailwind structure and neutral tokens, with no sections. Start here when you want the architect to define the whole system from your prompt, with nothing pre-styled to unlearn.
whenToUse: Pick when the user wants the look AND the sections defined entirely from their prompt, when no other kit matches the domain, or when strong existing brand guidelines would fight a pre-styled starting point. Ships zero sections on stock shadcn tokens — the architect authors everything from scratch. Avoid when the user expects a designed result on first render; every other kit ships real sections and lands closer.
